description_long: This is a two-story brick house surrounded by a white picket fence and a dense ring of leafy green trees. The house features a dark, shingled gable roof with several skylights or roof windows, and a prominent rounded bay window section on one side. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with white frames that contrast against the red brick exterior. The property includes a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, which is partially obscured by the trees. The landscaping is lush, with mature trees providing significant shade and privacy. The overall appearance suggests a classic, suburban residential home with traditional architectural elements.
description: A two-story red brick house with a dark gable roof, white-framed windows, and surrounded by dense green trees and a white picket fence.
description_view_0: The front and right side of the house are visible, showing the rounded bay window, main entrance area, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_1: The left side of the house is prominent, with symmetrical windows and the white picket fence more visible; trees partially obscure the view.
description_view_2: The rear and left side of the house are shown, with the roof and tree canopy dominating the view; fewer architectural details are visible.
description_view_3: The rear and right side of the house are visible, highlighting the back windows, fence, and the continuation of the tree ring.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a prominent bay window
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and white picket fence, partially obscured by trees
